notes: Eligibility and programme details extracted from the approved admission page.
undergraduate_eligibility: Passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology, with at least 45 percent marks taken together; reserved category candidates require 40 percent.
lateral_entry_eligibility: Diploma from an AICTE or DOTE approved institution with at least 50 percent marks, or B.Sc. degree from a recognized university with Mathematics at XII level and at least 50 percent marks; reserved category candidates require 45 percent. Additional conditions for B.Sc. stream students are listed on the official admission page.
mca_eligibility: Recognized Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration with Mathematics at 10+2 level and at least 50 percent in the qualifying examination; reserved category candidates require 45 percent.
mba_eligibility: Recognized Bachelor's Degree of minimum 3 years duration with at least 50 percent in the qualifying examination; reserved category candidates require 45 percent.
ug_programmes: B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AI&DS)
B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI&ML)
age_limit: General age limit shown on the official page: 21 years for first year admission and 24 years for lateral entry as on 1st July of the academic year under consideration; SC/ST candidates have 3 years relaxation. MCA and MBA are listed with no age limit.

notes: Direct admission contact shown on the approved admission contact page.
